subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-17 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: What a devoted and blessed woman! She [Aseyeh Allen] is always engaged in serving and teaching the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه مؤمنهٴ مقدّسهئ‌ی است همیشه بخدمت و تبلیغ امر مشغول است شوهرش با آنکه بهائی نیست
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
